footer.disclaimer: This site is not affiliated with the official Mexican Tax Administration Service (SAT).

ai_callout.title: Questions about SAT? Ask our AI Tax Assistant
ai_callout.desc: Solve your doubts about deductions, tax regimes, or step-by-step explanations directly with Artificial Intelligence.

home.hero_desc: Perform calculations for taxes, payroll, loans, investments, and depreciation for free, instantly, and with legal backing.
home.search_placeholder: Search calculator... (e.g. IVA, RESICO, ISR, Overtime)
home.favorites_empty: Mark calculators with a star ⭐ to get direct access here.
home.categories_desc: Select an area of interest to see the available tools.

sat.name: SAT Taxes
sat.desc: ISR, IVA, withholding tax, and provisional monthly return calculators.

nomina.name: Payroll & Labor
nomina.desc: Calculate net/gross salaries, Christmas bonuses (Aguinaldo), profit sharing (PTU), vacations, and overtime.

hipotecas.name: Mortgages
hipotecas.desc: Credit simulators for home acquisition and monthly payment estimates.

prestamos.name: Loans
prestamos.desc: Amortization of personal loans with weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly payments.

inversiones.name: Investments
inversiones.desc: Yield projection in Mexican Treasury Certificates (CETES) and fixed-income assets.

interes-compuesto.name: Compound Interest
interes-compuesto.desc: Visualize the growth of your capital over the long term.

tipo-de-cambio.name: Exchange Rate
tipo-de-cambio.desc: Official and market converter from USD to MXN and exchange rates.

negocios.name: Business
negocios.desc: Breakeven point, profit margins, and cost calculators.

contabilidad.name: Accounting
contabilidad.desc: Depreciation of fixed assets according to the Mexican Income Tax Law (LISR).

finanzas-personales.name: Personal Finance
finanzas-personales.desc: Projections for Mexican retirement funds (AFORE), pension, and 50/30/20 budget.

engine.result_disclaimer: Net result calculated according to current legislation.
engine.save_modal_desc: Assign a name to this calculation to quickly identify it in your local history.
